title: mentha suaveolens var. lepteilema
intro: Mentha suaveolens var. lepteilema is a variety of the Mentha suaveolens plant, commonly known as Round-leaved Pennyroyal, which is a type of mint native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including its essential oil, which is rich in menthone and has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mentha suaveolens var. lepteilema include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve headaches and fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested for medicinal purposes.
